title: Software Engineer
description: Builds and maintains software systems end-to-end, covering coding, testing, and system design.

title: Backend Developer
description: Designs server-side logic, APIs, and databases that power applications.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Creates user-facing interfaces with a focus on usability, performance, and visual design.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Works across both frontend and backend layers to ship complete features independently.

title: Data Analyst
description: Turns raw data into actionable business insights using queries, dashboards, and statistics.

title: Data Scientist
description: Applies statistics and machine learning to extract predictive insight from data.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Automates deployment pipelines and manages cloud infrastructure for reliability at scale.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Builds and deploys production machine learning models and data pipelines.

title: Cloud Architect
description: Designs scalable, secure cloud infrastructure and guides cloud migration strategy.

title: QA / Test Engineer
description: Ensures software quality through manual and automated testing strategies.

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Builds native or cross-platform mobile applications for Android/iOS.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protects systems and data by identifying vulnerabilities and monitoring threats.
